artPrompt: A widescreen noir film-still of a lean goblin rogue presiding over a cramped back room thick with cigar smoke, a tally of cronies crowding the shadows behind him as he tucks a small token into his coat with a cold smirk; a single amber lamp rims his sharp features, damp brick and a worn card table glinting at the edges, family business steeped in menace, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Racketeer of the Rookery
text:
Whenever Racketeer of the Rookery or another Goblin you control dies, you create a Favor token. Somebody always owes somebody for the funeral.
{B}, Sacrifice a Goblin: Each opponent loses 1 life.
flavorText: The family is large, expendable, and surprisingly well-organized about it.
